---
name: Bond Task
about: Give the bond a task using the prompt-contract structure
title: "Task: "
labels: bond-task
assignees: ''
---

## Inputs

Describe the codebase context, relevant files, and what the bond should look at first.

## Expected Output

Describe the desired code, docs, or behavior change.

## Constraints

List any architectural rules, scope boundaries, or forbidden approaches.

## Edge Cases

List failure modes, tricky cases, or compatibility concerns.

## Acceptance Criteria

List the concrete checks that determine when this task is complete.
